    "Minor valve cover gasket seepage (dampness with dust accumulation) without active dripping or measurable oil loss."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Clean the affected area to monitor for future progression.",
    "Document the seepage on the multi-point inspection report for future tracking.",
    "Advise the customer that no immediate repair is necessary but to monitor during regular oil changes."
  ],
  "rationale": "At 140,000 miles, minor seepage (sweating) without active dripping, undertray accumulation, or measurable oil consumption is a normal wear characteristic. It does not pose an immediate risk to engine operation or safety, so a 'pass' with monitoring is the most appropriate and honest recommendation for the customer.",
